channel.title: Geospatial on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Geospatial on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Geospatial & Mapping Servers: Nominatim, TileServer GL & GeoServer Guide 2026
item.description: Building location-aware applications means relying on maps, geocoding, and spatial data. The default path for most developers is Google Maps Platform — geocoding APIs, tile servers, routing engines, all billed per request. But when your application scales, those costs multiply fast. More importantly, you hand over your entire location data pipeline to a single vendor.
